title: POST /books endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:13-35 implements POST /books with title, author, year, isbn and returns 201

title: GET /books endpoint with author filter
evidence: src/app.ts:37-48 implements GET /books with ?author= query parameter support

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:62-94 implements PUT /books/:id with field validation and update

title: TypeScript implementation
evidence: package.json declares TypeScript 5.6.2 and Express 4.21.0 framework

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: src/db.ts uses better-sqlite3 with CREATE TABLE books schema

title: JSON responses with appropriate status codes
evidence: All endpoints return JSON: POST 201, GET 200, PUT 200, DELETE 204, errors 400/404

title: Input validation for required fields
evidence: src/app.ts:15-19 validates title and author are non-empty strings

title: Working source code
evidence: All TypeScript source compiles successfully, no build errors

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md exists with npm install, build, start, dev, test commands and endpoint documentation

title: Unit/integration tests
evidence: src/app.test.ts contains 7 passing tests covering all endpoints
